title: SOC Analyst
description: Dropbox Security Operations Center is seeking a SOC Analyst to monitor our infrastructure and systems for security threats and anomalies. You'll analyze security alerts, investigate incidents, and collaborate with incident response teams to defend our platform. You'll be part of a world-class security team protecting billions of files for millions of users.
responsibilities: Monitor security tools including SIEM, endpoint detection, and network monitoring systems
Investigate and triage security alerts and false positives to reduce alert fatigue
Escalate confirmed incidents to incident response team and provide detailed context
Conduct threat hunting to proactively identify potential compromises
Document investigation findings and update threat intelligence databases
Participate in incident response calls and contribute to post-incident reviews

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, Information Security, or related field
skills: Security monitoring and SIEM platform experience
certifications: CISSP, GIAC certifications (GCIH, GCIA) or equivalent security certification preferred

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, vision, and life insurance
On-site wellness facilities and commuter benefits
